violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Orange tape was holding the door of the small chest freezer in place. Tape was placed on the door shelves of the fridge in the back room.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Gaskets on the milk dispenser in the breakfast area and inside of the cappuccino machine need to be cleaned.
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
